.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
it
heckin
wimdy
Jimmy Tax
.
he is unimpressed with the beach today
I love this floof
so silly
totally adorable
sweetie pie
ma’am…. yous exploded
You and your sister were so floofy
Cutie pie
How to keep a puppy calm during a nail trim <3
Handsome guy
Caught a pretty sunrise the other morning
Just gorgeous
Sunset was just amazing the other week
.
So many different colors
.
now I just gotta get that damm popcorn ceiling down

item.title: Tim Curry Reflects On His Recovery After Suffering Two Blood Clots And Undergoing Brain Surgery
item.description: The actor says he had to relearn how to speak, a challenge for someone who "loves words" and admits he often has to be told to "shut up."
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Another conservative Pro Nazi group text leaked
item.description:
Does anybody think that they'll come to this realization and make any change? So far, for decades, they haven't.
Edit: This is another group chat. This is not the same as the Young Republicans. That's what makes this worse. And this comes as the White House is quite literally being torn down by the new fascist leader in America https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/oct/20/trump-nominee-paul-ingrassia-group-chats
item.dc:creator: SquaresNews

item.title: Ukraine; He has been fighting since day 1. It is his 5 or 6 WIA. Tbh, we’ve lost count and he probably has too. He plans to return.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: OC RHM and some vacation pictures
item.description:
If you saw my post yesterday, i kept the makeup for the rest of the day because i liked it so much lol
I went to a ramen workshop and made my very own noodles. The dish turned out delicious
We went to try traditional japanese archery.
Id say we didnt do too bad! Its not easy
Yummies
This was what I had
We went to see the imperial palace
I just love the architecture <3
We also went to the Samurai + Ninja museum
Its so cool they let you hold these old weapons
As a evangelion fan, this was a highlight
Im such a tourist lol
Can you believe that all of this was just about 7.50 in US dollars??
Next up was Universal Studios Japan
Entering Nintendo World <3
It was Halloween season so in the evening things get spooky. A lot of guests came dressed up too
I feel like back home in the US that would be kinda dangerous lol
A very small but super yummy hotdog i ate
We went to a beautiful aquarium
This reminds me of my inbox (im joking, or am i...)
I love penguins <3
Thats all for now, I hope you liked it! Onto more adventures I go
And cat tax, we went to a cat cafe and those cuties were welcoming new guests
item.dc:creator: walpurrga

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.128 ESCAPE FROM BIG TROUBLE
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Cristiano Cruz
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Hoodie Weather - Anitek YouTube: https://youtu.be/g_yDLcDgHZo?si=1l12pyc17S35u3mD Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/1HZPTfFhfvk9OaKwZlRB24?si=40738913335b4d02

Adrien Noterdaem
Tristan McGuire
Oliver K
Mariusz Gandzel
Kittichai Rueangchaichan
Omar Speups
Lena Kosiak
Casey Silver
Gal Yosef
Guillem Villar
Karis Renee
Quan Edwards
Leo Chiola
Alex B
ZeD
Mark Maggiori
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @DerpyVaz, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @aRootinaTootin, @Gorgoror, @kaeldra, @MooreBeers, @cloverleafbane, @Crapmonster ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Ok I laughed
item.description:
Yeah yeah I know, we shouldn’t make fun of things outside of their control. But I can suspend that rule once in a while for Stephen Miller.
Bonus Stephen Miller meme that I could never post because I can’t think of a good title (and it’s an OK meme, not great, not bad)
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars
